also does the usual no limited currency (silver) on standard banner rule apply here
because i'm looking at rates and abyssal descent only has 1 limited character but standard has 3 i also have 4 of the 6 characters unlocked
oh and does pity carry over?
Yes. Don't use limited currency on standard banner. Events will also give you lots of standard pulls.

Standard banners have a very small chance of letting you pull one of the "older" limited characters or limited wheels. This will happen pretty infrequently, but its a nice suprise when it happens. Don't count on getting a specific old limited character or wheel from the banner though, the odds of that are pretty rough.

Pity carries over.

Hey! I accumulated some resources, but is very anxious about how to spend them (30 normal cores, 40 luminous). I'm already on the third chapter of the story, and my team is lagging behind slightly, but I'm reluctant to spend resources of them in case they are suboptimal. My current characters are on the second image.
Please, help! What would you do with my resources and your game knowledge?
Resources aren’t super hard to get! Go ahead and spend them! It doesn’t take too long to catch up new characters either! Make use of Interlude
Also, you can test characters in interlude awakener trial
See which ones you like best

Ofc ofc

it targets highest hp when played as leap

Oh.. Thx!

Character specific Arc 2 relics that have a chance to appear when that character is in the party. In dtide every season includes a realm ring relic, which gives each character of that realm their image relic for free. Many of them are very strong

I'm waiting
n hoping GHelot is with em

I wanted an opinion. I've been pulling on Caro standard to try and get a Gelot or another Salvador or two to have a good main dps. I know we need 19+ chars for dtide, and that eventually I'll need to pull WoDs. Am I overinvesting in Caro and should I split my resources into other banners too, or is trying my luck for Gelot/Salvador/Thais copies on the standard banner still a good idea?

please pull for outside caro lol. limiteds have a very low chance of appearing in main banner btw, so i wouldn’t expect high chances of it happening frequently. aequor is a very easy realm to learn gimmick wise, and ultra has a lot of good supports. definitely go breadth before depth first!!

especially if you’re a newer player (i’m assuming based on the very small roster), pull for a bunch of different characters to feel out their playstyles and synergies. you don’t need to worry about dtide until waaaaay later
I find the gimmicks pretty straightforward, and from all I've seen aequor seems to be the worst realm late game outside of the gmurphy team, so I'm planning on skipping them for the meanwhile
it is never worth pulling for a specific limited, the rates of limiteds in standard are abysmally low
if you get a limited from standard it's a happy accident, it's not something you want to chase
with your account I would highly recommend pulling other banners to get more characters, because many characters have good utility/support options
and as you said, you need 19+ chars for dtide
teams are limited to 2 realms so if you don't have any of characters from those realms, you won't be able to build any of those teams to begin with
aequor is the worst realm endgame, but you won't be reaching endgame for quite a few months because it's heavily time/progress-gated
conversely aequor is the *best* realm earlygame for low-investment dtide clearing to get baseline rewards

so the optimal strategy is actually opposite - instead of skipping it now and investing into it endgame, you should be investing into it now and then moving away from it as you progress towards endgame
What's the best stopping point for xu enlighten?
e0 if you're f2p, if you're a spender and have pulls to spare then e2 is solid, e3 is great, and oe is luxury
Radix, Badges, and D-jewel are a bit confusing, since I could purchase cores or some other stuff with them, but I have no concept how valuable this "other stuff" really is
Like, how valuable are those WoDs? Should I just purchase luminous cores and that's it?

prototype horizon is #1 highest priority above all else, quite possibly THE most important thing to get in the entire game
after that is timeloop
after that, the value of the wheels depend on where you are in the game and how your pull economy is
dusk and dawn is an incredibly good wheel but if you're newer you might not have as much sediment saved up as older players or spenders, so it's fine to skip
heart of silver is useful at endgame when pushing high dtide but otherwise not that important, and annihilated rebirth is not recommended at all for anyone
Oh glad I asked
yeah, horizon lets you dupe any character in the game, including limiteds
so it's equivalent to an SSR character pull basically

About badges, I understand fairly well what these shards are doing, so question is if any of those characters are worth it, or is better to dump it all in cores? I'm using Ogier, and consider adding Lotan to the team
the cores are a one-time purchase, once you get all 5 they don't get restocked
it's definitely worth it to get the character shards yeah, you'll end up with a lot more badges over time than you can use
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710/1442292634575175710 also here's a more detailed breakdown of shop stuff

I recently recommended my friends starting Morimens and in the 1 chap of 1 arc they encountered an issue with text boxes for example here text just disappears and nothing is clickable, it also happened in 1-2. I checked these stages myself and had the same problem so is there a solution yet?
unfortunately not, sorry
was a bug introduced in the latest update
not much can be done atm except wait for them to fix it
Is DTide 1 through 3 that hard that non-aequor chars will have trouble clearing it though?
I believe someone mentioned the bug doesn't happen on autoplay, but you would have to use autoplay for all of the text
I skipped it and googled a youtube video for the missing sections
Annoying, but that's the best I came up with

not really, aequor just has a much easier time doing it at super low levels (like level 30-40), but realistically you won't have any issues clearing lvl1 with base lvl60 standard characters of any realm

but also 5 teams means you need a minimum of 19 characters to even do it, and you have to clear all 5 waves in order to get the baseline rewards (and the easiest way to get 19 characters fast is to pull from every realm in standard banner)
oh okay I thought the recent translation bug got hot fixed as well as this issue but I guess not yet, ty!
Would you say that any 19 chars would be good enough as long as the teams have some semblance of dps/supps, or they need a bit of synergy to actually clear?
at level 60 for A1, you can honestly throw anything at the wall and it'll stick, at lower levels (30-40) for speedruns it'll need some level of synergy to clear
https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/comments/1qury9d/dtide_sample_teams_low_investments_a1a2_clears/

If your units are 40, I would suggest skipping w5 for now.. it is a rather difficult wave. Ping me if you need further clarifications
No, they're much lower
Question was if I was harming my account if I kept trying to pull for Gelot/another Salvador, or if I should pick up chars from other banners
And if skipping Aequor was fine or if they're too op for early dtide
Oh
I would suggest pulling for aq units tbh
You're probably not wat the stage where your main story team cant clear content yet
Spreading some pulls for d tide would be nice
Besides you already have the best caro support thais
Thais and Leigh ofc
What makes aequor so much stronger early game than other realms? Tentacle damage that op?
Early game, tentacles provide decent base dmg, easy access to shielding and some burst dmg
E.g. at lvl 40. White stance may give around 40?? Idk shield on demand
Giving you access to stall comps
Like caecus who builds up counter
Even if you don't stance change blue stance scales tentacles without you doing anything

U can build pure Aequor as u want and its will be viable pack from only standart. U can just pull blue until 4 different drops and this can freely go to ch 7-8. Other realms will have some troubles. Ultra will have huge problems I think. they don't have good sustain and their chorus and dd are very... Unusual. I'm still wondering whats Cassiah role is. Draw Daff exalt out or Ultra to drop x2 may be
And would you guys suggest going for the E3 Caecus and E2 Goliath like some guides suggest, or just a few E0 chars and move on?
E2 Goliath can do fun thing with bosses like Mouch
Steal about 100 dmg and send back to face is funny
Are bosses often stacking that much strength or is it a very niche occurrence and not worth spending the pulls just for it?
U anyway will love Goliath with Several&Scar at almost every encounter cuz u can shred dmg better than some supports -str xd
I'd say 1of5 boss will stack str on self

Strength steal on goliath is nice, but he isn't a very flexible support sadly. He suffers from the same problem a lot of blues have where in the lategame you generally don't want to splash them into other non-blue teams because the realm mechanic isn't that good.

I really wish this wasn't true and I could just throw goliath onto a team when there is a boss that has a lot of strength.

Goliath is great in gmurphy with his exalt and strength steal, and he can be ok with blue 24 (which is kind of a whale team and very squishy).
Yeah, that's why I was thinking of just skipping aequor
But if I'll be missing losing pulls on early dtide because I'll be clearing it later than if I pulled on aequor, maybe I should just go for them

Aequor is nice in the early/midgame for tentacles statchecking easier dtide a1-a3. TBH its up to you. If you think the realm might be fun, no harm in going for them. Next limited is aequor and they might make the realm more appealing. BIAV certainly cooked with gmurphy.
What if I don't think the realm looks that fun, but I want to optimize my pulls? 😜

but truly endgame will happen in a 1-2 month i think. until that Aequor can grant u easy walk. and u can grab limited to form stronger packs. u will anyway need 5 pack at very late. some of "meta" dtide packs contains Aequor as u can check.
hm, how long have you been playing?
Around a week, and blue boys drag me to Twin Statues without any problems. Twin Statues are sick af, but it last boss of chapter
I'm not worried about the story, that's easy enough anyway
More worried about going through dtide and climbing the levels asap to get a steady income of pulls
Also, I've been seeing a lot of people saying Ultra is a great realm to pull on cause it has op supps, but aren't the op supps mostly limited?
Winkle is great and Tinct looks decent but the others don't look that strong

Kind of. Ultra has two of the best limited supports (horla and clem). Ultra also has some pretty good standard supports in tinct, winkle, and jenkins (more common as a crit damage exalt support for castor than a dps in endgame). Casiah is also pretty strong, but I think she is a little more niche to discard strats.

Yeah, the standards sound very niche (as most do to be fair), and winning the y1 limiteds don't sound that great other than horla so I to me it doesn't look that great of a realm to pull comparatively
I'd assume I'd eventually end up with a couple of copies of the chars just from losing on limited ultra banners, and they seem to work well at low enlightens
Hi

<@103185840775127040> <@1466728269335363656> 

Personally when i was new. I only started clearing 5 waves of d tide around 1-2 months mark.

D tide is the end game content with 5 varying difficulties. 

Generally, you'll only be able to do the hardest with a support whale unit when you're new. You might be able to do ONE alert 5 3-4 months later with your own units (main story team).

The bulk of the rewards come from doing at least each wave once (alert 1).

Lmk if you wanna push for d tide early or just play at your own pace
Different ppl have different goals so ill give a tailored advicr indeed
Instead
